name: Argo Gold Inc.
description: Argo Gold Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company advancing high-grade gold projects in northwestern Ontario, including the Uchi Gold Project in the Red Lake district and the Talbot Lake property, where multiple mineralized trends including the Woco, Northgate, and Raingold Zones have been identified. Listed on the CSE since 2015, the company has diversified its portfolio to include oil development assets in the Lloydminster area of Alberta, with three producing oil wells brought on-stream in December 2023. Argo Gold is an early-stage explorer targeting high-grade gold discoveries in proven Ontario gold camp geology.
